svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="IqQ_OMcDImXVWQSvsAyn"> <mxGraphModel dx="2338" dy="2994" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart TD
 Client[\"Client Device\"]
 
 subgraph NetworkLayer [Network Connectivity]
 Local[\"Local Network\"]
 VPN[\"Tailscale VPN\"]
 end
 
 Server[\"Ubuntu Server\"]
 
 subgraph DockerLayer [Container Environment]
 Bridge[\"Docker Bridge\"]
 Host[\"Host Network\"]
 end
 
 Client --> Local
 Client --> VPN
 Local --> Server
 VPN --> Server
 
 Server --> Bridge
 Server --> Host
 
 Bridge --> Homepage[\"Homepage\"]
 Bridge --> Nextcloud[\"Nextcloud\"]
 Bridge --> Kuma[\"Uptime Kuma\"]
 Host --> Jellyfin[\"Jellyfin\"]

 style Server fill:#2c3e50,stroke:#34495e,color:#fff
 style Client fill:#3498db,stroke:#2980b9,color:#fff
 style Homepage fill:#ecf0f1,stroke:#bdc3c7
 style Nextcloud fill:#ecf0f1,stroke:#bdc3c7
 style Kuma fill:#ecf0f1,stroke:#bdc3c7
 style Jellyfin fill:#ecf0f1,stroke:#bdc3c7
 style NetworkLayer fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#ddd
 style DockerLayer fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#ddd",
 "config": null
}" id="24"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject
